description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a dark, distressed finish, giving it a vintage or industrial appearance. The front features three open shelves for storage or display, with a curved profile on the sides that adds a touch of character. Below the shelves, there is a single large drawer, which provides additional enclosed storage space. The back is flat and unadorned, while the sides are solid and show the same dark, weathered texture as the rest of the piece. The overall construction appears sturdy, with straight legs and a rectangular footprint. This type of furniture is suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or sidewalk displays.
description: A tall, dark, distressed wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and a large lower drawer, featuring curved side profiles and a sturdy, vintage look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves, a large lower drawer, and curved side profiles.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid, flat side panel and the curved profile of the shelves and drawer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned back panel with visible wood grain and weathered finish.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with a solid panel and visible shelf curvature.
